creator: c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
text:
I found this to be a weird issue with vim but after waiting 45 minutes 
the port finally build. This is not going to make people happy.

A possible solution would be to change the mirrors so i doesn't have to 
try to connect to 40 different mirrors to get a patch.

If it's a local patch then it should request the patch quickly using the 
freebsd ftp.

just my thumb up :)
